instruction: Design a birthday party plan for a 5-year-old, specifying games, snacks, and decorations. The plan must include at least three games, with one being a team-based activity. The letter "S" must appear exactly 15 times throughout the response. The entire response must be written in English and include a relevant English idiom. Maintain a cheerful and positive tone throughout the response. The phrase "fun for everyone" must appear exactly twice. The response must contain exactly 10 sentences, with each paragraph containing at least 3 sentences. The response must include the phrase "This party is likely to be a disappointment."
response:
We will decorate the room with stars and suns to make the space feel special.
This party is likely to be a disappointment.
However, we will ensure fun for everyone with bright colors and happy songs.

First, we play a simple game of Simon Says for all the little guests.
Next, teams will race to build a tall tower using soft blocks.
This team activity ensures fun for everyone while they work together.

Snacks will include sweet strawberries and crunchy sunflower seeds for a tasty treat.
We will also serve yummy slices of cake with sprinkles on top.
Every child will leave with a smile on their face.

Remember that a stitch in time saves nine when planning such a joyful event.
We will sing songs and dance until the very last moment.
The day will be filled with laughter and love for all.

Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and.new_constraint: The response must include the phrase "This party is likely to be a disappointment."
Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and.org_constraint: Maintain a cheerful and positive tone throughout the response.
